title: phoebe tavoyana
intro: Phoebe tavoyana, a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, is a deciduous tree native to the Western Ghats of India. The bark and leaves of Phoebe tavoyana have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Phoebe tavoyana is often used in herbal preparations like decoctions and infusions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical formulations.
